items.summary: OpenAI researchers show that reinforcement learning on desired behavioral traits like truthfulness and corrigibility works across domains. items.title: Google appeals ruling that made it directly liable for AI-generated search overview content
items.summary: Google is appealing the ruling by Germany's Munich Regional Court, which held the company directly liable for inaccurate AI search results. items.title: Website "In the Weights" shows whether AI models know who you are
items.summary: Two former OpenAI employees have built a website called "In the Weights" that reveals which people AI models can recall purely from their training data.
